name: Split Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
2 servings of about 1-1/3 cups each calorie content per serving
1. Add all ingredients to boiling water.
2. Return to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently until peas are tender--about 40 minutes.
3. If necessary, uncover and cook, stirring occasionally, until desired thickness is obtained--about 5 minutes.
4. Remove bay leaf.
5. Serve half of the soup. Refrigerate remaining 2-1/3 cups for use at another meal. The soup will keep 3 to 4 days in the refrigerator.
6. To reheat soup, stir in 1/4 cup water. Heat until soup starts to boil, stirring as needed to prevent sticking.
